name_cn:
MIUMIU Calfskin Backpack, Small
Black 🖤
The bag is crafted from high-quality calfskin, offering a substantial feel and rich texture ✨
Classic MIU-style collegiate design, fresh and youthful
Practical multi-pocket layout, stylish and casual 🎞️
With top handle
Front zip pocket, side flap pocket
Buckle flap closure
With lining and card slot
🔍Size: 22*18*11.5cm
📌Model: 5BZ043M1480
